title: Power Coxswain
description: Have fun on the water by mastering the waterways in your chosen boat.

tips.title: If you hold The Scout Association's Personal or Leadership Activity Permit for Power Boating or Personal Watercraft (Jet Ski), a Leadership Permit for Narrow Boating or Motor Cruising or the RYA Level 2 Powerboat Award, you automatically gain this badge.
Learn about water safety with the RNLI.
tips.details: You could [book a free visit from the RNLI to learn about water safety](https://rnli.org/youth-education/educational-visits).

safetyAlert: Young people must be appropriately supervised by an activity permit holder or a qualified external instructor.
